summary: All 10 active scene transitions verified: correct target .tscn paths, all files exist on disk, all scenes have attached scripts. ParchmentPreRun+BroceliandeForest3D use safe PixelTransition fallback pattern (headless-compatible). 3 WARNs: dual menu path (MenuPrincipal vs Menu3DPC), MapMonde stub, TransitionBiome dead constant.

checks.note: Active path: Menu3DPC→ParchmentPreRun (director removed quiz+rencontre path)
Uses safe PixelTransition fallback pattern: get_node_or_null('/root/PixelTransition') with change_scene_to_file fallback. Headless-compatible.
HubAntre goes DIRECTLY to BroceliandeForest3D, skipping TransitionBiome. SCENE_TRANSITION const is declared but unused.
Uses same PixelTransition fallback pattern. When _merlin_found=false → HUB_SCENE (HubAntre).

checks.code: ui.show_end_screen(ending) — stays in MerlinGame scene, shows overlay
checks.note: No scene transition needed — UIOverlayEndScreen is created dynamically within MerlinGame.

checks.code: Calendar, MenuOptions, Collection, ArbreDeVie — all via PixelTransition
checks.note: ArbreDeVie.tscn → arbre_de_vie_ui.gd verified. Calendar, Collection, MenuOptions all exist.

warnings.finding: ui_overlay_narrative.gd:289 transitions to 'res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn' (MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd). Active main menu is Menu3DPC.tscn (menu_3d_pc.gd). If narrative escape triggers, player lands on OLD menu. Fix: update ui_overlay_narrative.gd:289 to target res://scenes/Menu3DPC.tscn.

MapMonde.tscn exists but has no script attached (empty Control). HubAntre.gd:23 SCENE_MAPMONDE const declared but NEVER used in transition calls. MapMonde appears only in dev SceneSelector. Not a blocking risk.
HubAntre.gd:16 SCENE_TRANSITION='res://scenes/TransitionBiome.tscn' declared but never referenced in transition code. HubAntre goes directly to BroceliandeForest3D. Dead constant — minor code smell.

verdict: PASS — All active game scene transitions are wired to existing, scripted scenes. No broken transitions in the main game loop. 1 MEDIUM warning: ui_overlay_narrative→MenuPrincipal should target Menu3DPC.
